email_subject: Application for Warehouse Worker - Baver Ok
email_body:
Dear Hiring Team,

I am writing to apply for the Warehouse Worker position at your biotech company in Zwijnaarde, as advertised via Start People. With recent hands-on experience in a high-volume logistics environment at Katoen Natie, I am accustomed to maintaining accuracy and efficiency while following strict procedures. I am detail-oriented, comfortable with computer systems and Microsoft Office, and communicate well in English. I am eager to contribute to your mission in the fight against cancer and am motivated to learn new skills in a GMP/GDP-regulated setting. I am available to start as soon as possible and can travel independently to Zwijnaarde.

Thank you for considering my application. I look forward to the opportunity to discuss how my background aligns with your team.

Best regards,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Dear Hiring Team,

I am excited to apply for the Warehouse Worker position at your biotech company in Zwijnaarde, as advertised through Start People. Your company's mission to bring innovative CAR-T cell therapy to patients resonates deeply with me, and I am motivated to contribute to such impactful work.

I bring recent, relevant experience from my role at Katoen Natie, where I worked in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment. There, I developed a strong sense of accuracy and efficiency, ensuring that all processes were followed meticulously. I am comfortable with inventory management, receiving and inspecting goods, and maintaining proper documentation—skills that align directly with the responsibilities outlined in the job description.

I am detail-oriented and take pride in following procedures carefully to ensure product quality and safety. I am also proficient with computers and Microsoft Office, which will support the documentation and tracking aspects of the role. I communicate well in English and am comfortable working in an international team. I am eager to learn new skills, particularly in a GMP/GDP-regulated environment, and am committed to contributing to a supportive team culture.

The shift schedule and the opportunity for a permanent contract after six months are very appealing to me, as I am looking for a long-term role where I can grow professionally. I am available to start immediately and can travel independently to Zwijnaarde.

Thank you for considering my application. I would welcome the chance to discuss how my experience and enthusiasm can benefit your team.

Sincerely,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cv_highlights:
Warehouse & Logistics experience at Katoen Natie (2025-2026) maintaining accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume environment
Detail-oriented with strong procedural adherence for quality and safety
Proficient with computers and Microsoft Office for documentation and inventory tracking
Excellent English communication skills for an international team
Motivated to learn new skills and contribute to a mission-driven biotech company
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Junior professional with hands-on warehouse and logistics experience at Katoen Natie, where I maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume environment. Detail-oriented and comfortable with computer systems, including Microsoft Office, for documentation and inventory tracking. Strong English communication skills and motivated to learn new skills in a GMP/GDP-regulated biotech setting. Based in Zwijndrecht, next to Antwerp, and able to travel independently to Zwijnaarde.

CORE SKILLS
- Warehouse & Logistics: inventory management, receiving/inspecting goods, order picking/packing, documentation, procedural adherence
- Computer & Office: Microsoft Office, data entry, inventory tracking systems
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (A2, in progress)
- Additional: detail-oriented, team collaboration, quick learner

EXPERIENCE

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Own on-page SEO for client websites, from keyword research to publishing, improving organic visibility and search rankings
- Write keyword-targeted blog content for client websites to grow organic traffic
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress using Elementor and the Astra theme, including content uploads and page updates
- Track site performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Google Ads to guide SEO and content decisions

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site (Elementor, Astra) for a Belgian youth chess champion: full site structure, on-page SEO, and social media integration (Instagram/Facebook)
- Implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema, including SportsEvent and FAQPage), entity/knowledge-graph markup, and an llms.txt file to improve visibility across traditional and AI-powered search engines (GEO/AEO)
- Ran iterative technical SEO/GEO audits, measurably raising the site's overall search-health score

EDUCATION
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

References available on request.
